Cusp

Staff Operations Platform

Solving the "who goes where" problem for multi-location orthodontic practices. Data-driven staff allocation instead of gut feel, text chains, and COO bottlenecks.

73
API Endpoints
730
Backend Tests
13
Sprints Complete
8
Scoring Dimensions

The Problem

Multi-location practices waste hours daily deciding who goes where.

Text Chain Chaos

Every morning starts with a flurry of texts: who's out, who can cover, who drove to Norton last week. No single source of truth.

COO Bottleneck

One person makes all staffing decisions. When they're sick or busy, the whole system stalls. Their knowledge isn't captured anywhere.

Invisible Fairness

Staff perceive assignments as arbitrary. "Why do I always go to Norton?" Nobody tracks float frequency, overtime risk, or consecutive remote weeks.

Real Constraints

Norton needs 11 staff on Tuesdays by 7:30 AM (75-min drive). Bristol runs Mon/Wed/Fri only. New assistants handle 7 patients; seniors handle 15. A spreadsheet can't optimize this.

What Cusp Does

Four integrated capabilities that replace the entire manual workflow.

1. Smart Staff Allocation

OR-Tools constraint solver generates 2 scored solutions in under 30 seconds. HR compares side-by-side, selects one, publishes. Staff get SMS notifications.

2. Performance Tracking

Tablet-based patient tap logging with offline-first sync. Automatic aggregation into daily metrics. Dual outlier detection flags over/under-performers.

3. Availability Management

Staff submit availability and preferences. Managers approve. The solver respects it all automatically. Call-in and late tracking for day-of disruptions.

4. Executive Oversight

Dashboard with staffing coverage, action items, and alerts. Weekly trend reports. Score explanations that make allocation decisions transparent.

Executive Dashboard

At-a-glance staffing status: who's on duty, coverage gaps, action items.

Quick stats, per-office staffing cards, action items (unpublished runs, outlier alerts, staff requests), recent allocation runs

The Allocation Engine

Constraint-based optimization that generates 2 scored solutions for human review.

100-Point Scoring System

Patient/Staff Ratio
40 pts
Overtime Avoidance
20 pts
Training Preservation
10 pts
Travel Feasibility
10 pts
Staff Preferences
10 pts
Understaffing Buffer
10 pts
Float Fairness
bonus
Consecutive Remote Guard
10 pts

Weights are configurable per run. Score breakdowns are visible in the UI with plain-language explanations.

Side-by-side solution comparison. HR sees total scores, per-dimension breakdowns, and can expand allocations before selecting.

Schedule & Staff Management

See who's assigned where. Manage the roster, skills, and notification preferences.

Schedule view (By Date): 18 staff across Johnson City, with role, office, and shift times. Tabs for By Staff and By Office views.
3 real offices: Johnson City (15 chairs, Mon-Fri), Bristol (5 chairs, Mon/Wed/Fri), Norton (9 chairs, Tue only)
Staff profile: role, home office, experience tier, daily patient target, notification preference toggle, skills

Productivity Tracking

Per-staff metrics with dual outlier detection and weekly trend reports.

Metrics tab: per-staff daily stats with outlier flags. Office summaries. Filterable by date range and office.
Weekly Trends: bar charts with efficiency overlay. Configurable week range (4/8/12 weeks).
Tablet tap interface: large touch targets for New Patient / Recall. Offline-first with IndexedDB sync.

Full Staff Roster

18 staff members across 4 roles, 3 experience tiers, with skills and SMS consent tracking.

Filterable staff list: name, role, home office, experience level, status. Click through to edit profile, manage skills, set notification preferences.

Development Roadmap

13 sprints complete. Approaching pilot readiness.

Phase 1: Foundation

Complete

User auth, domain models, CRUD APIs, CSV import, availability workflow. Sprint 1

Phase 2: Allocation Engine

Complete

OR-Tools solver, 2-solution generation, comparison UI, manual override, publish with SMS. Sprints 2 + 6

Phase 3: Productivity Tracking

Complete

Tap logging (offline-first), daily aggregation, productivity dashboard, weekly trends, outlier detection. Sprints 3 + 6 + 9

Phase 4: Polish & Pilot Prep

Complete

Executive dashboard, SMS consent (TCPA), multi-tenancy, notification preferences, UI error states. Sprints 7-9

Phase 5: Hardening

Complete

Security audit (exception narrowing, fixture centralization), tech debt cleanup, Ruff linter. Sprints 10-12

Phase 6: Final Features

Complete

Call-in/late tracking, score explanations, consecutive remote guard, overtime scoring accuracy. Sprint 13

Next: Pilot

Up Next

2-week pilot at Johnson City with real staff and real data. Optimization tuning based on pilot feedback.

Future: Patient Communication

Planned

Patient-facing features, appointment reminders, demand forecasting. Note: this phase triggers HIPAA requirements.

Technical Foundation

Production-grade architecture with comprehensive test coverage.

730
Backend Tests
87
Frontend Unit Tests
126
E2E Tests
73
API Endpoints
30
Tenant Isolation Tests
6
User Roles

Backend

Django 5.2 + Django Ninja (REST). PostgreSQL. Celery + Redis for async. OR-Tools for constraint optimization.

Frontend

React 19 + TypeScript strict. Vite build. shadcn/ui + Tailwind. Zustand state. TanStack Query. Recharts.

Multi-Tenant

Full data isolation. Every API, model, and Celery task scoped by tenant. 30 cross-tenant leakage tests.

Offline-First

Tablet logging uses IndexedDB + background sync. Works without WiFi. Client-generated UUIDs for idempotent sync.

Cusp Staff Operations Platform — Built for Mountain View Orthodontics

April 2026
